attributes.name: [AWS SQS OTel] DLQ empty 99.5% rolling 30 days
attributes.description: Tracks dead-letter queue correctness: 99.5% of 1-minute intervals must show zero visible messages on DLQ queues (QueueName matching *dlq*). Any message in a DLQ represents a processing failure and dropped work — the primary SQS error signal. Adjust the QueueName pattern if your DLQ naming convention differs.

params.filter: data_stream.dataset: "aws.sqs.otel" AND Namespace: "AWS/SQS" AND MetricName: "ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible" AND stat: "Maximum" AND QueueName: *dlq*
